2606.24324.title: Prague Dependency Treebank -- Consolidated 2.0: Enriching a Complex Annotation Scheme
2606.24324.paper_summary: The Prague Dependency Treebank framework is unique in its attempt to systematically include and link different layers of language, including a meaning representation with several types of inter-sentential phenomena, especially coreference and discourse relations. We present its second consolidated version (PDT-C 2.0), which concludes almost 30-years long project of sustained development of the resource to a uniformly and coherently annotated, genre-diversified, almost 4 million token language resource of Czech language, with accompanying fully compatible lexicons. In addition to continuous linguistic research, the richly linguistically annotated corpus is also widely used in international comparisons of the development of traditional and novel NLP tools as well as in conversions into other formalisms. The corpus and the trained parsers are available under the CC BY-NC-SA licence.
2606.24324.paper_summary_zh: 布拉格依賴樹庫框架在系統性地包含和連結不同語言層面方面是獨特的，包括具有多種句間現象的意義表徵，特別是共指和話語關係。我們呈現其第二個整合版本（PDT-C 2.0），這標誌著持續發展該資源近30年的項目結束，該資源是一個統一且一致標註的、類型多樣的、近400萬標記的捷克語語言資源，並附有完全兼容的詞彙表。除了持續的語言研究外，這個豐富的語言標註語料庫在傳統和新型自然語言處理工具的發展的國際比較中也被廣泛使用，以及在轉換成其他形式主義中的應用。該語料庫和訓練好的解析器在CC BY-NC-SA許可下提供。
2606.24324.author: Marie Mikulová et.al.
2606.24324.authors: Marie Mikulová, Jiří Mírovský, Milan Straka, Pavlína Synková, Jan Štěpánek, Barbora Štěpánková, Jan Hajič
